Episodes.Plot: Goku charges to full power as Captain Ginyu watches. Bulma mourns the atrocities that Frieza has caused. Nail returns to Guru and Gohan and Krillin look for Bulma and her dragon radar. Guru unlocks Dende's hidden power and Frieza ...

Episodes.Title: Bikkuri!! Gokû ga Ginyû de Ginyû ga Gokû
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Brice Armstrong, Kyle Hebert
Episodes.Plot: Nail lures Frieza away from Guru, and they fight; Goku fights Captain Ginyu; Bulma is chased by dinosaurs, and she scolds Gohan and Krillin when they show up.

Episodes.Title: Ide yo Sûpâ Shenron!! Boku no negai o kanaetamae
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Brice Armstrong, Kyle Hebert
Episodes.Plot: Vegeta storms Frieza's ship looking for the dragon balls. Gohan and Krillin find the dragon balls and attempt to call Shenron as Vegeta watches. Having switched bodies with Captain Ginyu, Goku rushes to find Ginyu and Jeice before...

Episodes.Title: Yatsu wa ora ja ne~e! Gohan bibiru na chichi o ute!!
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Brice Armstrong, Laura Bailey
Episodes.Plot: Gohan and Krillin fight Captain Ginyu, who is still in Goku's body; Vegeta fights Jeice; Nail continues to fight Frieza.

Episodes.Title: Dai gosan!! Ginyû ga kaeru ni natchatta
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Brice Armstrong, Laura Bailey
Episodes.Plot: Captain Ginyu, back in his own body, allows Vegeta to pound on him until he is ready to attempt another body switch, but Goku has other plans; afterward, everyone prepares to fight Frieza. Meanwhile, Frieza continues to beat on Nail.

Episodes.Title: Nanatsu no tama o soroeshi mono yo... Sâ aikotoba o ie!
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Brice Armstrong
Episodes.Plot: Start of the "Frieza Saga". Goku recovers in the isolation chamber, Gohan guards the dragon balls, and Vegeta rests while they all wait on Krillin's return; Dende looks for Krillin and Gohan; Frieza finishes interrogating Nail.

Episodes.Title: Kami-Sama mo ikikaetta! Sûpâ Shenron de Pikkoro ga fukkatsu
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Takeshi Aono
Episodes.Plot: With Porunga summoned, Krillin, Gohan, and Dende make their wishes after Gohan consults with Piccolo; Vegeta grows angry when he wakes up and realizes what has happened; Frieza flies toward the Z Fighters.

Episodes.Title: Saikyô senchi no tanjô ka!? Neiru to Pikkoro ga gattai
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Brice Armstrong, Laura Bailey
Episodes.Plot: Frieza powers up while everyone watches; Nail tries to convince Piccolo to merge with him; the battle with Frieza begins.

Episodes.Title: Akumu no chô henshin!! Sentô-ryoku 100 man no Furîza
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Laura Bailey, Chris Forbis
Episodes.Plot: Frieza talks about his history with Vegeta's father and his attempted rebellion, and he transforms into a more powerful version of himself; Bulma runs from a dinosaur stampede.

Episodes.Title: Koko made ka!? Kyôaku chôzetsu pawâ ga Gohan o osou
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Laura Bailey
Episodes.Plot: Frieza tortures Krillin; Yamcha becomes frustrated because he can't help his friends; Bulma despairs; in a rage, Gohan attacks Frieza.

Episodes.Title: Ikki ni keisei gyakuten!! Okurete kita senshi, Pikkoro
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Ryô Horikawa
Episodes.Plot: Frieza taunts Vegeta, who stands helpless as he watches Frieza stand over the defeated Gohan. Goku itches to join in the fight. Piccolo rushes to help Gohan as he thinks back on their time together and Krillin rejoins the fight to...

Episodes.Title: Pikkoro no jishin! Furîza o taosu no wa ore da
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Laura Bailey, John Burgmeier
Episodes.Plot: Piccolo joins the fray and fights Frieza alone.

Episodes.Title: Shutsugeki da Gokû!! Gekido no Furîza ga dai 2 no henshin
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Laura Bailey, John Burgmeier
Episodes.Plot: The battle between Piccolo and Frieza rages on, and Frieza makes his second transformation.

Episodes.Title: Kyôfu shiro!! Furîza wa 3-do no henshin de shôbu suru
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Laura Bailey, Toshio Furukawa
Episodes.Plot: In a rage, Gohan saves Piccolo from Frieza, who makes his final transformation. Meanwhile, Vegeta gets Krillin to attack him so that he can become stronger when Dende heals him.

Episodes.Title: Dende no shi... Dete koi! Tobikiri Zenkai pâwâ
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Laura Bailey
Episodes.Plot: After Frieza kills Dende, he fights Gohan, Piccolo, Krillin, and Vegeta.

Episodes.Title: Machi ni matta ze, kono shunkan!!! Son Gokû ga fukkatsu da
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Mayumi Tanaka, Ryô Horikawa
Episodes.Plot: Determined to prove that he is a Super Saiyen, Vegeta gives Frieza everything he has.

Episodes.Title: Munen...!! Hokori takaki Saiyajin - Bejîta shisu
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Toshio Furukawa, Banjô Ginga
Episodes.Plot: Frieza continues to wail on Vegeta until Goku arrives. After Frieza recognizes Goku as the son of a former opponent, the battle is on. Also, Vegeta, near death, gives a heartfelt speech of remorse for his actions.

Episodes.Title: Chô kessen no makuake da!! Omee dake wa ora ga taosu
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, John Burgmeier
Episodes.Plot: The battle between Goku and Frieza continues after Piccolo, Gohan, and Krillin get out of their way. Also, the entire planet begins to fall apart due to the intensity of the fighting.

Episodes.Title: Gekitotsu no 2 dai sûpâ pâwâ! Honki dôshi no nikudansen!!!
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Cynthia Cranz
Episodes.Plot: Goku, realizing that Frieza can't sense him, formulates a plan while he is underwater, but Frieza has some tricks of his own. Meanwhile, despite everyone's best efforts, Chi-Chi is determined to go to Namek.

Episodes.Title: Furîza kyôfu no sengen! Te o tsukawazu omae o taosu
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Brice Armstrong
Episodes.Plot: Goku and Frieza agree to keep the fight on the ground, and Frieza decides to fight without using his hands; Chi-Chi urges Dr. Briefs to fix the ship, which was broken by the Ox King; Yajirobe tries to sneak off while Puar and Oolo...

Episodes.Title: Hattari ja nê zo!! Daitan suteki na Yatsu - Son Gokû
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Brice Armstrong
Episodes.Plot: After Goku refuses to join him, Frieza reveals that he has been using only one percent of his power. He charges to fifty percent, and he and Goku continue to fight. Meanwhile, Captain Ginyu, in Bulma's body, watches the battle as ...

Episodes.Title: Ketchaku da!! Honô no keshin 20-ban Kaiô Ken no Kamehameha
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Brice Armstrong
Episodes.Plot: Goku loses hope as he is thrashed by Frieza, and he must rely on his love for his friends and family to summon enough strength to rebound. Meanwhile, Gohan must find a way to return Bulma to her own body.

Episodes.Title: Chô tokudai no Genki-Dama Kore ga saigo no kirifuda da!!
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Brice Armstrong
Episodes.Plot: Weakened from using Kaio-Ken X20, Goku takes a beating from Frieza until he receives a vision from Vegeta. Meanwhile, the Ginyu Force arrives on King Kai's planet.

Episodes.Title: Chansu o ikase!! Pikkoro sutemi no engo shageki
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Brice Armstrong
Episodes.Plot: Goku gathers energy for his spirit bomb. Meanwhile, the Ginyu Force tests its powers on King Kai's planet.

Episodes.Title: Genki-Dama no chô hakai-ryoku!! Ikinokotta no wa dare da!?
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, John Burgmeier
Episodes.Plot: Piccolo holds off Frieza while Goku finishes forming the spirit bomb. Meanwhile, Yamcha, Tien, and Chiaotzu fight the Ginyu Force.

Episodes.Title: Tsui ni henshin!! Densetsu no Sûpâ Saiya-jin: Son Gokû
Episodes.Actors: Monika Antonelli, Brice Armstrong, John Burgmeier
Episodes.Plot: Goku, Krillin, Piccolo, and Gohan celebrate the defeat of Frieza, but they may be celebrating too soon. Meanwhile, Yamcha, Tien, and Chiaotzu continue fighting the Ginyu Force.

Episodes.Title: Ikari bakuhatsu!! Gokû yo, min'na no kataki o utte kure
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Cynthia Cranz, Chris Forbis
Episodes.Plot: Goku, now a Super Saiyan, takes out his anger on Frieza; Gohan takes Piccolo to safety; Roshi senses Goku's new power.

Episodes.Title: Namekku-sei shômetsu ka!? Daichi o tsuranuku ma no senkô
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Takeshi Aono
Episodes.Plot: Frieza realizes that he can't defeat Goku, so he decides to destroy Namek; Gohan drops off Piccolo on the ship and looks for Bulma; there is a calamity at Frieza's base.

Episodes.Title: Katsu no wa ore da... Ikinokori o kaketa saishû kôgeki
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, John Burgmeier
Episodes.Plot: Goku and Frieza continue to fight as the planet falls apart around them, and Frieza charges to one hundred percent power. Meanwhile, Gohan searches for Bulma.

Episodes.Title: Shenron yo ushû o hashire!! Semaru Namekku-sei shômetsu no toki
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Takeshi Aono
Episodes.Plot: While Goku and Frieza continue to fight, Kami and King Kai discuss how they should use the wish from the dragon balls that Mr. Popo has collected. Also, Gohan and Bulma return to the ship and try to get it working.

Episodes.Title: Boku wa Son Gokû no musuko da!! Gohan, futatabi kessenjô e
Episodes.Actors: Masako Nozawa, Monika Antonelli, Takeshi Aono
Episodes.Plot: Goku and Frieza continue to fight; Gohan, no longer sensing his dad's power level, decides to leave the ship and face Frieza himself; Shenron works on granting the wish.
